# Quick Fix: iOS Bluetooth Permission
Generated: 2026-02-17T16:21:48Z

## Change Made
- File: `attendance_app/lib/features/permission/data/datasources/permission_local_datasource.dart`
- Line: 39
- Change: Replaced `Permission.bluetoothScan` with `Platform.isIOS ? Permission.bluetooth : Permission.bluetoothScan`

## Verification
- Syntax check: PASS (conditional expression is valid Dart)
- Pattern followed: Matches existing `Platform.isIOS` pattern already used at line 28 for WiFi `skipCheck`
- `dart:io` import: already present at line 1 (no new import needed)

## Files Modified
1. `attendance_app/lib/features/permission/data/datasources/permission_local_datasource.dart` - bluetooth permission now uses `Permission.bluetooth` on iOS, `Permission.bluetoothScan` on Android

## Notes
- `skipCheck: false` preserved — bluetooth requires actual permission on both platforms
- On iOS, `Permission.bluetoothScan` was returning `permanentlyDenied` because it is Android 12+ only; `Permission.bluetooth` is the correct iOS enum value
